subcodes.first_line: O herald of the Kingdom of God! Rumi hath said: "Yesterday the venerable Shaykh wandered through the city with a lamp, searching amidst beasts and demons..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی بملکوت الله ملا میگوید دی شیخ با چراغ همیگشت گرد شهر کز دیو و دد
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @poems and quotation from poetry
